title: diosma collina
intro: Diosma collina is a small, shrub-like plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to South Africa. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and aiding in the relief of menstrual cramps. Diosma collina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
